name: Keyboard Warrior
author: Poki
description: Ready your fingers for a fast-paced multiplayer keyboard typing game packed with speed races, clever puzzles, and chaotic challenges. Test your accuracy and reflexes as you type under pressure, compete head-to-head with friends, and climb the leaderboard. Every round turns typing into an adrenaline-pumping party experience. Do you have what it takes to become the ultimate Keyboard Warrior? How do I play Keyboard Warrior? Use your keyboard to type in the correct words when you ee them on the screen! Who created Keyboard Warrior? Keyboard Warrior is created by Set Snail. Play their other game on Poki: Daddy Long Legs How can I play Keyboard Warrior for free? You can play Keyboard Warrior for free on Poki. Can I play Keyboard Warrior on mobile devices and desktop? Keyboard Warrior can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Keyboard Warrior with my friend? Yes! Keyboard Warrior is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!
